summary: Iteration 35 testing completed successfully. All requested features verified: Backend notes flow (create with @mention, update, pin/unpin via PATCH, add/delete comments, list returns mentions/comments/pinned compatibility fields), Report generation with aggressive_mode parameter persists in content.aggressive_mode, Frontend NotesSection renders with live status badge/mentions/comment thread controls, ReportsSection includes aggressive mode switch in generation dialog, ReportView displays aggressive badge and premium summary/TOC, DeadlineTracker includes Add to Google Calendar and Download ICS actions, /contacts redirects to /legal-contacts with cross-links.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py: Notes endpoints fully implement mentions extraction (extract_mentions function), is_pinned toggle via PATCH, threaded comments with author tracking, and WebSocket realtime collaboration
Backend server.py: ReportRequest model accepts aggressive_mode boolean, passed to analyze_case_with_ai() and persisted in report.content.aggressive_mode

Frontend NotesSection.jsx: Renders live status badge (data-testid='notes-live-status-badge'), live users badge, mention suggestions, note cards with @mention highlighting, THREAD comments section with add/delete
Frontend ReportsSection.jsx: Generation dialog includes aggressive mode switch (data-testid='aggressive-mode-switch') with description, reports show aggressive badge when content.aggressive_mode=true
Frontend ReportView.jsx: Premium design with Command Summary box, Appeal Readiness Gauge, Table of Contents, aggressive mode badge (data-testid='report-aggressive-mode-badge')
Frontend DeadlineTracker.jsx: Calendar actions with Google Calendar link (data-testid='deadline-google-calendar-link-{id}') and Download ICS button (data-testid='deadline-download-ics-btn-{id}')
Frontend App.js: /contacts route configured with Navigate redirect to /legal-contacts (line 291)
Frontend ContactPage.jsx: Contains link to Legal Contacts Directory (data-testid='contact-page-directory-link')
Frontend ContactsPage.jsx: Contains link to Contact Deb (data-testid='legal-contacts-contact-deb-link')

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all components render correctly, no runtime errors)

seed_data_creation: Created test user/session/case/note/deadline/report for authenticated UI testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35 verified all new features. Key findings: 1) Backend notes flow complete with mentions, comments, pin toggle, WebSocket realtime 2) aggressive_mode parameter accepted in report generation and persisted in content 3) NotesSection shows Live Sync Active badge, mention suggestions, threaded comments 4) ReportsSection aggressive mode switch in dialog, badge on reports 5) ReportView premium design with Command Summary, Appeal Readiness Gauge, TOC, aggressive badge 6) DeadlineTracker Google Calendar and ICS download actions functional 7) /contacts -> /legal-contacts redirect working, cross-links present on both pages. All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing.
